standards.name: Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023
standards.description: Governs collection, processing, and storage of personal data of Indian citizens.
standards.agent_rule: Any SOP involving PII (name, email, Aadhaar, PAN, phone, biometric) must include a data minimization check. Flag retention periods > 3 years without documented basis.
key_obligations: Right to erasure within 72 hours of request
Breach notification to DPBI within 72 hours

standards.name: IT Act Section 43A — Sensitive Personal Data
standards.description: Body corporates handling SPDI must implement reasonable security practices (IS/ISO/IEC 27001).
standards.agent_rule: Flag any data flow involving financial, health, sexual orientation, or biometric data. Require CISO sign-off.

standards.name: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 Information Security Management
standards.description: ISMS framework. Annex A controls cover access management, encryption, incident response.
standards.agent_rule: Verify access controls exist for any automated process writing to production databases. Flag missing MFA, encryption at rest, and log monitoring.

standards.name: SEBI Cyber Security and Cyber Resilience Framework
standards.description: Mandatory for SEBI-regulated entities. Covers vulnerability assessment, incident reporting, BCP.
standards.agent_rule: For financial market workflows, check VAPT frequency (quarterly minimum), patch SLA (critical: 24h, high: 7d), and incident reporting chain.

standards.name: CERT-In Directions 2022
standards.description: Mandatory incident reporting within 6 hours. Log retention minimum 180 days. NTP synchronization.
standards.agent_rule: Any automation that handles network logs, access logs, or security events must preserve logs for >= 180 days. Flag any auto-delete rules < 180 days.

standards.name: RBI IT Governance Framework (Banks & NBFCs)
standards.description: Covers IT strategy, risk, security, business continuity for regulated entities.
standards.agent_rule: For banking/NBFC workflows: require dual-control for payment automation, daily reconciliation, and segregation of duties in any agentic process touching Core Banking.

standards.name: Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing
standards.description: Quarterly VAPT for internet-facing systems; annual for internal systems per SEBI/RBI requirements.
standards.agent_rule: If deploying new agent endpoint, flag for VAPT scheduling. Do not deploy to production without security sign-off.

standards.name: Access Management — Principle of Least Privilege
standards.description: Agents must operate with minimum necessary permissions. No standing admin access.
standards.agent_rule: Validate all tool permissions before execution. Block any tool call requesting write access beyond the declared scope. Log all elevated-permission requests.
